What's going on everyone? Welcome to the gym launch fulfillment section. It's going to be awesome. Buckle up. So what is fulfillment? It is the everything that happens between getting money and getting mo money. So basically once you have made the sale, everything that happens after the sale that should lead to making another sale with that person and continuing the lifetime relationship of the customer. This is where most businesses fundamentally fail and they believe that they are trying to make sales to other way around. They get customers to make sales rather than making sales to get customers. And so you need to make sales with the intention of getting a customer rather than getting customers with the intention of making sales. I know that sounds weird to say, but ultimately you're trying to build a relationship with this person that they continue to give you money. And obviously in order to do that, it means you have to provide exceptional value so that they have the desire to give you more money. So fulfillment overview. There are a whole bunch of different offers that we are providing for you. So 42-day detox, 42-day challenge, 6-week challenge. These are like the last two are fundamentally the exact same thing. We provide at the time of this making, those are the two examples that we have that you will be able to fulfill with. The beauty is that whichever one you do not use, you can use on the back end to sell them into which makes the abandoned hope sale which I'm going to get to in the next modules which is the reselling ascension portion. So you're going to use both of these. Just use one as bait for the other. It does not matter. It's basically just whichever one you are marketing is what you will sell on the front end and then whatever you did not market you will sell on the back end which allows you to have a higher conversion rate on the back end into the EFT. So that being said, it does not matter and maybe at the time you are watching this there might be a third player or fourth player whatever it is. There is going to be arsenal of different things that you can use but they will all fundamentally work the same way which is that there is a widget that attracts the person in. We are going to change them through fitness, nutrition, accountability and so it's just the widget of how we are doing the nutrition or how we might structure the offer might be tweaked. But the sale will be the same and ultimately the fulfillment system that I am going to lay out for you works with all of them the exact same way. Now one of the questions I always get is when we do internal plays so if we do a big bootie boot camp or we do a bring a friend challenge or bring your spouse or accountability challenge or all of the myriad different plays that we run internally to our existing customers in order to further engage them, collect more dollars and also make supplement sales. Does this framework work the exact same way? Does this supplement sign system that is bolt on to these nutrition orientations work the same way? The answer is yes. Once you understand how the nutrition orientation links to the supplement sale and then how to manage the clients within a defined end period, once you understand how those three play together you can use it for any play that you have. Okay, so I just want to be clear about this. This is not specific to the 60 chance, it's not specific to the 42 day detox. We're going to use those as examples of how to fulfill and how to explain the meal plan to that person. But basically once you understand how any play works that's the only thing that's going to swap out but the process will remain the same. You're going to meet them, you're going to provide the meal plan, you're going to add them to these groups, blah, blah, blah, blah. The process will be the same and that's the value and that's what I'm going to show you. Okay, and then when I say etc. here it means there's going to be other plays that don't exist here. I named the three that are already here, the six week challenge and 42 day challenge are the same thing. It's just marketed differently but it's six weeks. 42 day detox is just a different fulfillment portion. Internal plays again, different fulfillment and there may be more at the time of you watching us. Same framework. Now, after we get into how each of these work there's going to be a section on preparation and client management systems. So the preparation piece is all the stuff that you're going to need to do before these people start. So this is like make sure it gets done by the weekend if that's when you are doing your nutrition orientations and weigh-ins for your programs. I always had our weigh-ins on Saturdays. That way I can have a consistent process leading into it. It's up to you. But for us it was always Saturdays and Monday evenings. And so we just made sure that I had all the stuff printed out. We had enough clipboards, all that kind of stuff and we will give you those lists in a moment. And then the client management system is how do you actually optimally manage these people so that it's as little work as possible so that no one falls through the cracks and you provide exceptional service. So I'll give you the system that I spent $30,000 failing at until I got it right. After that is game day, right? It's weigh-in day. And so this is when all these people who gave us money are going to be coming in excited. But is it bright-eyed and bushy-tailed to see what is going to happen with the opportunity for us to wow them? So we want to wow them. We want them to feel awesome about their purchase and excited to start. And so this whole weigh-in day is choreographed to give them an exceptional experience and predispose them to buying supplements, which leads me to the next thing here. So supplement sales, if you have already gone through S3, so supplement sign secrets, you do not need to go through these portions because they are already covered. Essentially, you're going to be doing the nutrition, orientation, and bolting on the supplement sale as described in supplement sign secrets. If you have not gone through that portion, then we have relocated those three trainings, just those three trainings to here. So that way, the tech piece is just how to set up getting paid essentially and how to process sales, etc. The selling portion is how to sell the products and how to do the assumed closes, how to get people to subscribe and save all of that. And then the recordings. So sales examples. If you want more training on supplement sales, then just go to the supplement sign secrets portal and you can watch the remainder of the videos there. But this is kind of the bare bones of just what you need in order to, if you needed to sell tomorrow, I would say go through the tech, go through the selling, and then you're good to go. The last piece is now that they are in our gym, they've done the way in day, how do we continue to over deliver with value to them? How do we blow them away? How do we maximize referrals? How do we maximize organic marketing and virality from all the place that we do? And after doing this a lot of times, we have a pretty simple system that worked very well to generate more referrals. I would usually on average get about 25% of the number of people starting a program in referrals. So if I had 50 people who started a program in a given week, then from those 50, I would usually generate 12-ish referrals that would come from them. And then finally FAQs, common-ask questions that come with this. So we reorganized this so that within the different plays, I'm going to explain how to explain the nutrition for that specific play rather than having one general one, and hopefully that should serve you better. And with every new play that we come out, we'll have a little, hopefully a little video that explains what is unique about it and how to provide the service. So that is how this works. That is the overview of the fulfillment section, and we're going to get Jiggy with it momentarily.
